◎译　　名　奥德里与戴茜

◎年　　代　2016

◎片　　长　95分钟
◎主　　演　黛西·科曼 Daisy Coleman


◎简　　介  

　　After two high school girls in different towns are sexually assaulted by boys they consider friends, online bullying leads each girl to attempt suicide. Tragically, one dies. Assault in the social media age is explored from the perspectives of the girls and boys involved, as well as their torn-apart communities.Sundance - World Premiere
